About me

With well over a decade of experience as a Freelance Magento 2 Developer in London, I am the perfect Freelance Developer to help you with a new Magento 2 project or a Magento 2 Upgrade.

If you need a Freelance Magento developer for a project or upgrade you would like some help with, or even if you just want to find out a little more, please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Magento 2 Developer

  • Responsive Magento 2 templating
  • Custom Magento 2 extensions
  • Magento 2 configuration / deployment
  • Magento 2 performance optimisation
  • Search engine optimisation (SEO)
  • Third party integrations

Magento 2 Upgrade

  • Platform suitability audit
  • Product, order and customer migration
  • Custom platform development
  • Hosting / systems architecture
  • Third party integrations
  • Search engine optimisation (SEO)
Featured projects

As most agency clients prefer me not to feature the Freelance Magento 2 Developer or Freelance Magento 2 Upgrade Consultant work I did for them, I'm unable to show a full project history here. So, I've chosen a few projects that were commissioned directly by ecommerce businesses. If you would like to see some of the Freelance Magento 2 Developer and Freelance Magento 2 Upgrade Consultant work I've done for agencies, please get in touch!

tomfoolerylondon.co.uk

  • Magento
  • HTML5
  • CSS3
  • jQuery
  • SASS

Following a hugely successful redesign I completed in 2012, I was hired to carry out a full rebuild of this Magento website in May 2016.

The new Magento template was built from the ground up and a number of custom Magento extensions were developed in order to improve the user experience and make the site easier to manage.

In the first month after the rebuild, the client saw a substantial increase in sales which paid for the development work and then some.

ecooutfitters.co.uk

  • Magento 2
  • HTML5
  • CSS3
  • jQuery
  • SASS
  • Grunt

A custom Wordpress microsite to support the launch of tomfoolery's in house brand - metier.

Creative direction was supplied by the client and custom post types were used to simplify the management of the content, despite the complex nature of their categories.

The brand launch was a success and the client has enjoyed strong sales in a competitive market place.

yogaunited.com

  • Magento 2
  • HTML5
  • CSS3
  • jQuery
  • SASS

I was commissioned to do a full rebuild of an aging Magento website in summer 2015, with only logos and colours supplied by the client.

The new Magento template was built from the ground up and a number of custom Magento extensions were developed to meet complex fulfilment and content management requirements.

Since the new Magento site was launched, the client experienced a strong uplift in sales which paid for the development work in a matter of weeks. It's an ongoing relationship, so updates are likely!

metierbytomfoolery.co.uk

  • Magento
  • HTML5
  • CSS3
  • jQuery
  • SASS
  • Grunt

A custom Wordpress microsite to support the launch of tomfoolery's in house brand - metier.

Creative direction was supplied by the client and custom post types were used to simplify the management of the content, despite the complex nature of their categories.

The brand launch was a success and the client has enjoyed strong sales in a competitive market place.

Get in touch!

If you have a Magento 2 upgrade or development project for me, or you would just like to find out a little more, please send me a message and I'll do my best to get back to you promptly.
